items.title: Do weighted blankets help you sleep better? Here's what to know
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Weighted blankets are a popular choice to warm up in cold weather, but research on their effectiveness is limited. Scientists think the added pressure could calm the brain’s fight-or-flight response or signal the brain to produce what’s called the love hormone. (AP Video: Mary Conlon).

#weightedblanket 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Protesters in Georgia accuse government of 'destroying' their country
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Protesters in Georgia have accused the government of 'destroying' their country as mass unrest continues. Fueled by anger over the government's u-turn towards Russia, protesters took to the streets of the country's capital Friday into Saturday morning, where riot police used tear gas and water cannons to disperse them. (AP video/ Kostya Manenkov). 

#georgia #news #tbilisi

items.title: Trump meets with Macron in Paris ahead of Notre Dame reopening
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
U.S. president-elect Donald Trump met with French President Emmanuel Macron on Saturday during his visit to the French capital to attend the reopening of the iconic Notre Dame cathedral.

#trump #macron #paris #news

items.title: Trump, Macron and Zelenskyy meet in Paris before Notre Dame reopening
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
U.S. President-elect Donald Trump met with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy on Saturday during his visit to the French capital to attend the reopening of the iconic Notre Dame cathedral. French President Emmanuel Macron hosted the meeting at Elysee presidential palace ahead of a ceremony set to celebrate the restoration of the cathedral.

#trump #zelenskyy #macron #news

items.title: Archbishop knocks on doors of Notre Dame at reopening ceremony
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
With three resounding knocks on its doors by Paris Archbishop Laurent Ulrich, wielding a staff carved from fire-scorched beams, Paris' Notre Dame cathedral roared back to life Saturday evening.

#notredamecathedral 
Photo credit: EPA POOL

items.title: Notre Dame's fabled grand organ reawakened at opening ceremony
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Notre Dame's thunderous great organ was heard in public for the first time since 2019 at the cathedral's reopening ceremony Saturday night. 

#notredamecathedral

items.title: Trump meets Prince William in Paris after Notre Dame reopening ceremony
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
U.S. President-elect Donald Trump met with Britain’s Prince William Saturday at the British Embassy in Paris after attending the reopening ceremony of Notre Dame Cathedral. 

#trump #news #princewilliam

items.title: Macron praises rebirth of Notre Dame as sign of hope for the world
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
French President Emmanuel Macron expressed “gratitude” Saturday to those who saved, helped and rebuilt Notre Dame Cathedral. He made the comments during a ceremony as the cathedral reopened its doors for the first time since a fire in 2019 nearly destroyed the building.

#notredamecathedral #macron

items.title: Pearl Harbor survivors return to Hawaii to honor those killed in 1941 attack
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
On the 83rd anniversary of the Pearl Harbor attack, a 104-year-old survivor mustered the strength to stand and salute during a remembrance ceremony honoring those killed in the Japanese bombing that thrust the U.S. into World War II.

#pearlharbor

items.title: US announces nearly $1 billion more in longer-term weapons support for Ukraine
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin has announced that the U.S. will provide nearly $1 billion more in longer-term weapons support to Ukraine. It was one of Austin’s last major speeches as President Joe Biden’s defense secretary.

#ukraine #russia #news

items.title: UN envoy calls for urgent talks to ensure 'orderly political transition' in Syria
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Multi-country discussions on Syria ended on the sidelines of the Doha summit on Saturday as anti-government fighters continued their march onto Damascus. Eight key countries, including Saudi Arabia, Russia, Egypt, Turkey and Iran gathered with the U.N. special envoy for Syria, Geir Pedersen, for two hours of discussions.

#syria #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

items.title: World leaders attend the reopening of Paris's Notre Dame Cathedral
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
World leaders and dignitaries - including US President-elect Donald Trump, America’s First Lady Jill Biden, Britain’s Prince William and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy - joined some 1,500 guests for the reopening of Paris's Notre Dame Cathedral on Saturday.

#trump #notredamecathedral

items.title: Zelenskyy and Zourabichvili hold talks in Paris ahead of Notre Dame reopening
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy met his Georgian counterpart Salome Zourabichvili in Paris on Saturday before they both attended the Notre Dame cathedral reopening. Zelenskyy's media office said he expressed solidarity with the Georgian people amid the ongoing mass protest movement after the Tbilisi government's decision to suspend EU accession talks.

#zelenskyy #ukraine #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

items.title: Trump, Macron and Zelenskyy leave for Notre Dame ceremony after trilateral talks
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
French President Emmanuel Macron and US president-elect Donald Trump held a hastily arranged meeting with Ukraine leader Volodymyr Zelenskyy before celebrating the reopening of the Notre Dame. Macron and leaders across Europe are trying to persuade the president-elect to maintain support for Ukraine in its defense against Russia’s invasion. (AP video by Alexander Turnbull).

#trump #zelenskyy #macron
